---
title : "What Are Just Salaries for Different Occupations in Chile? A Factorial Survey Approach"
date : "2009-07-01"
author : "Castillo, J."
categories : ["Conference paper"]
publication : " 21st World Congress of Political Science – IPSA. Santiago de Chile: Universidad de Chile"
publication_short : " 21st World Congress of Political Science – IPSA. Santiago de Chile: Universidad de Chile"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, J. (2009). *What Are Just Salaries for Different Occupations in Chile? A Factorial Survey Approach*.  21st World Congress of Political Science – IPSA. Santiago de Chile: Universidad de Chile

:::
